message:
feat(bundler): add local modification safety and conflict detection

Protect user modifications during bundle install/update:
- Content-addressed hashing (SHA256) for modification detection
- Conflict detection when both local and bundle have changes
- Backup/restore functionality for safe updates
- `ms bundle conflicts` command for checking modification status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
